title: Text templates in a dropdown menu for easy Email - Sending?

posts.author: KayKay (Kayla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Monday-ers!

In our Monday board, we have an area to write freehand text (a column) that when I check a mark on another column, sends that email to our customers.

We’d like to integrate into this text column “Templates” IE - custom ready made templates, which we can select one to use and edit it accordingly.

I couldn’t find anything in the matter for the life of me! Has anyone had any experience with this?
